name: codex-commit
description: Generate git commit messages from staged changes with local Codex CLI.

codexCommit.codexPath.description: Path to the local Codex CLI executable.

codexCommit.model.description: Optional Codex model override, for example gpt-5.4-mini.

codexCommit.reasoningEffort.description: Reasoning effort for the Codex CLI request.

codexCommit.debugLogging.description: Write Codex CLI diagnostics to the 'Codex Commit' output channel.

codexCommit.commandTemplate.description: Optional full command template. Use {{promptFile}} to reference the temporary prompt file.

codexCommit.promptTemplate.default:
根据以下 git diff，生成一个简洁明确的 git commit message。要求：
- 直接只输出最终 commit message
- 不要解释
- 默认使用 Conventional Commits 风格，但描述使用中文
- 尽量准确概括本次变更
- 如果无法判断，给出最稳妥的一行提交信息

{{diff}}
codexCommit.promptTemplate.description: Prompt template passed to Codex. Use {{diff}} as the Git diff placeholder.

codexCommit.timeoutMs.description: Timeout for the Codex CLI command.
